# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

build:
  script:
    - echo "Build triggered by merge request title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Build triggered by merge request description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Deployment tag: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" > deployment_tag.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_tag.txt

release:
  stage: release
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Releasing with deployment tag: $(cat deployment_tag.txt)"
    - # Code to generate release notes based on MR title and description
